title: Blocked and non-blocking assignments to different bit-slices of the same variable

features.name: packed array with mixed assignment types to different slices
features.description: Code should include a packed array where one index is assigned via continuous assignment while other indices are driven by an always_ff procedural block with non-blocking assignments

features.name: packed struct with mixed assignment types to different fields
features.description: Code should include a packed struct where one field is assigned via continuous assignment while another field is driven by an always_ff procedural block
